name: Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the cooked potatoes.
2. In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, layer half of the grated potatoes and sprinkle with shredded Cheddar cheese.
3. Sprinkle generously with seasoned salt.
4. Repeat the layers with remaining potatoes, cheese, and seasoned salt.
5. Pour half and half over all the layers.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
